problem: Why do perovskite solar cells degrade — what material instability causes it?
hypothesis: If Shape memory alloy phase transition is applied to instability, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Accelerated degradation study with 9 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Nature uses only the longest threads to weave her patterns. — Richard Feynman
